subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of My heart! According to the command, thy letter was dispatched to His Eminence Darbághi, upon whom rest the peace of God. The Tablet which beareth the name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوب فوادی حسب الامر پاکت جناب درباغی علیه سلام الله ارسال شد لوحیکه باسم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
